Featured Products

Our Core Products

Premium baby products certified for international markets

MOQ: 50 PCS
ASTM F833-23 CPC

ASTM Certified Baby Stroller

High-performance travel stroller with one-hand fold in 2 seconds. ASTM F833-23 & EN 1888 certified, 247+ export batches with zero return rate. Ideal for retailers targeting on-the-go families.

View Details
MOQ: 100 PCS
EN 1930 CPSC

EN Certified Safety Gate

Auto-close baby safety gate with double-locking system. EN 1930 & ASTM F1004 certified, 189+ export batches. Extension kits available for wider openings up to 150cm. Perfect for baby-proofing specialists.

View Details
MOQ: 80 PCS
CPC ASTM F404

CPC Certified High Chair

Food-grade high chair with FDA & LFGB certified materials. 7-position height + 3-position recline, dishwasher-safe tray. 205+ export batches, 18-month warranty. Ideal for premium baby stores.

View Details
MOQ: 60 PCS
EN 1930 CPSC

Baby Bed Rail Safety Guard

Heightening bed rail with breathable mesh window for visibility. Adjustable length 120-200cm, fits 20-60cm mattresses. EN 1930 & CPSC certified, 156+ export batches. Great for online marketplaces.

View Details

How It Works

Simple Procurement Process

From inquiry to delivery, we've streamlined every step for your convenience

01

Inquiry

Tell us your product requirements and quantity

02

Sample

We send you samples for approval (3-7 days)

03

Order

04

Production

05

Delivery

Business Terms

Clear Terms, Smooth Transactions

Transparent payment, shipping, and quality assurance for your peace of mind

💰

Payment Terms

  • T/T: 30% deposit, 70% before shipment
  • L/C at sight for large orders
  • Alibaba Trade Assurance available
🚢

Shipping

  • FOB Shanghai Port
  • Sea/Air/Express options
  • DDP service available
✅

Quality Assurance

  • IQC: Incoming materials check
  • IPQC: During production checks
  • OQC: Final inspection + photos
🛡️

After-Sales

  • 24h response to inquiries
  • Quick resolution for issues
  • Free replacement for defects
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What certifications do your baby products have?

Our baby products are certified with ASTM F833-23 (US standard for strollers), EN 1888-1:2018 (EU standard for strollers), EN 1930:2012 (EU standard for safety gates), ASTM F404-23 (US standard for high chairs), CPC (Children's Product Certificate), ISO 9001:2015 (Quality management system), and CE marking. All certifications are verifiable with test report numbers provided upon request.

What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ) for your baby products?

Our MOQ varies by product: Baby Stroller - 50 units, Safety Gate - 100 units, High Chair - 80 units, Bed Rail - 60 units. For startups and first-time orders, we can negotiate lower MOQs (as low as 30 units) with a small surcharge of 10-15%. Please contact us to discuss your specific needs.

How long is the lead time for sample and mass production?

Lead times: Sample production: 3-7 days (standard products), Custom sample: 7-10 days, Mass production: 15-25 days after sample approval, Rush orders: Available with 10-15% surcharge. We provide daily production updates via WhatsApp or Email, and can share photos and videos upon request.

View All FAQs
